raw_consumer_statement: Citibank charged me {$150.00} for a purchase I didnt make at XXXX XXXX. I had called numerous times to dispute the amount plus the late fees. They have not corresponded with me to resolve the problem. I have talked to their fraud representative and mailed out a letter to dispute. Ive never even used this particular Citibank card for any of my purchases. After this is resolved I am going to cancell all my Citibank cards. I dont want anything to do with them. When I found out my card was used fraud ky XXXX immediately called them to report. This was XXXX months ago and they have neglected my concerns. My next step is to get my lawyer and fight for damages and stress that they have imposed on me. The time I put in to dispute my charge.
